changes.value:
## What
The `git::types` module in sem-core defines `FileChange` and `FileStatus` — plain data structs with serde derives. These have NO git2 dependency. Copy them into `crates/swissarmyhammer-sem/src/git_types.rs` (flat module, no git:: nesting needed).

Do NOT copy `git::bridge` — that's the git2-dependent code we're eliminating.

The `parser::differ::compute_semantic_diff` function takes `&[FileChange]` as input, so this type must be in the new crate.

Files:
- `crates/swissarmyhammer-sem/src/git_types.rs` (new, ~40 lines from vendor/sem/crates/sem-core/src/git/types.rs)
- Wire into lib.rs as `pub mod git_types`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `swissarmyhammer_sem::git_types::{FileChange, FileStatus}` compiles
- [ ] These are the same types used by `compute_semantic_diff`
- [ ] No git2 dependency

## Tests
- [ ] `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-sem` passes
SEM-3: Create git_types module (FileChange/FileStatus without git2)
